COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Multi-volume sets in decorative bindings. Collected authors include: Robert Burns, James Fenimore Cooper, William Cowper, Charles Dickens, Alexander Dumas, Ralph Waldo Emerson, John Fiske, Johann Wolfgang von Goethe, Nathaniel Hawthorne, Oliver Wendell Holmes, Victor Hugo, John Ingram, Washington Irving, Charles Lamb, Henry Wadsworth Longfellow, James Russell Lowell, Edward Bulwer Lytton, Thomas Moore, Francis Parkman, Walter Scott, Eugene Sue, Lord Alfred Tennyson, and John Greenleaf Whittier.
Cite As:
Collected Editions of Standard Authors, #8003.
